name: ERD Builder Pro
desc: ERD Builder Pro is a professional-grade, high-performance web application designed for developers and database architects to build, document, and visualize complex data structures.
defaultEnv:
SUPABASE_URL=your_supabase_url
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=your_service_role_key
R2_ACCOUNT_ID=your_cloudflare_id
R2_ACCESS_KEY=your_cloudflare_access_key
R2_SECRET_KEY=your_cloudflare_secret_key
R2_BUCKET_NAME=your_cloudflare_bucket_name
R2_PUBLIC_URL=your_public_cdn_url
VITE_SUPABASE_URL=your_supabase_url
VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=your_anon_key
VITE_ENABLE_GUEST_MODE=true
